name: White Beans Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon dried parsley (or fresh is best)
Garlic to taste (about ½ teaspoon crushed garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and sauté the scallions until they begin to brown.
2. Add broccoli and carrots (if using) to the skillet, continuing to sauté until the vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in the cooked white beans.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together rice milk, cornstarch, dried parsley, "chicken-flavor" vegetarian broth powder, nutritional yeast, and garlic.
5. Pour the mixture over the broccoli and beans, stirring to combine and create a thick sauce.
6. Cook for an additional minute or two until the sauce has thickened and is creamy.
7. Serve hot over corn pasta.
